With just 7 wins and 10 losses in the last season, all eyes are on how the Miami Dolphins plan to bounce back on the field in the next season.

articles.title: Former Liverpool leader Steven Gerrard praises £60 million Chelsea star Joao Pedro over Enzo Fernandez after Blues edge Leeds to reach FA Cup final
articles.description: Chelsea secured a narrow but important 1-0 win over Leeds United in the FA Cup semi-final. The match was held at Wembley Stadium on Sunday. The victory came at a crucial time for the Blues, who were playing their first match after the departure of Liam Rosenior. Midfielder Enzo Fernandez led the team as captain and scored the only goal in the first half to seal the result.

articles.title: De Grasse clocks 19.84s to win 200m at Botswana Golden Grand Prix
articles.description: Andre De Grasse won the men's 200m in 19.84s at the Botswana Golden Grand Prix. Jerome Blake won the men's 100m, while Gabby Thomas broke the 11-second barrier to win the women's 100m. Kayla White claimed the women's 200m title.

articles.title: Aaron Rodgers’ future grows more intriguing as Mike Tomlin fuels fresh debate by backing veteran QB
articles.description: Mike Tomlin’s early NBC appearance delivered a strong take on Aaron Rodgers’ future, predicting the quarterback will continue playing in 2026. Drawing from a year of close interaction, Tomlin highlighted Rodgers’ deep attachment to the daily process of football. However, uncertainty remains around Rodgers’ offseason approach and timing. With limited options across the league and a crowded Steelers quarterback room, Pittsburgh still appears the most likely destination if Rodgers decides to return.

articles.title: IPL 2026: 'Nandri Chennai' - Shubman Gill shares special post with yellow whistle after GT beat CSK
articles.description: Shubman Gill celebrated Gujarat Titans’ win over Chennai Super Kings with a “Nandri Chennai” post. GT chased 159 comfortably, winning by eight wickets with 20 balls to spare. Sai Sudharsan starred with 87, supported by Gill and Jos Buttler. Earlier, Ruturaj Gaikwad made 74*, but Kagiso Rabada’s strikes restricted CSK.

articles.title: Tomlin: Exit partly rooted in recent playoff woes
articles.description: Mike Tomlin told NBC's Maria Taylor that he walked away, in part, because of the recent lack of playoff success and a belief that some of his veterans were "worthy of the excitement and the optimism associated with new leadership."

articles.title: Nationals top White Sox on Abrams' sacrifice fly, Tena's pinch-hit HR in 10th
articles.description: CJ Abrams' sacrifice fly scored automatic runner Daylen Lile from third in the 10th inning, pinch-hitter Jose Tena followed with a solo homer and the Washington Nationals beat the Chicago White Sox 2-1 on Sunday for their second straight extra-innings win.

articles.title: Payton Pritchard drops career-playoff-high 32 as Celtics shoot down Sixers to take 3-1 lead
articles.description: Payton Pritchard scored a career-high 32 points off the bench. The Boston Celtics defeated the Philadelphia 76ers 128-96. This victory gives the Celtics a commanding 3-1 lead in their playoff series. Jayson Tatum also had a strong performance with 30 points. The Celtics are now one win away from advancing to the next round.

articles.title: Klay Thompson–Megan Thee Stallion breakup: Did singer ask for for $700K amid cheating row?
